title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils contains gingerols and shogaols, which are bioactive constituents with anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, a major contributor to ulcerative colitis symptoms. The anti-inflammatory properties of gingerols and shogaols also help slow down cell death and reduce the severity of symptoms. The oil's antispasmodic properties can help ease abdominal pain and cramping associated with ulcerative coliti...
